query: 26th Franco-German Ministerial Council July 2026 defence security council outcomes agreements

reasoning: Content A provides direct, primary-source material (official government PDFs and the Elysee page matching the anchor) specifically from the 26th Franco-German Ministerial Council and its Defence and Security Council conclusions, giving an LLM concrete text to draw from.
